[Verse 1]

You got a fast  car,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Em9[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch]
I want a ticket to anywhere.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]A9sus[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Em9[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch]
Any place is    better,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                       [ch]Em9[/ch]      [ch]A9sus[/ch]
starting from zero, got nothing to lose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A9sus[/ch]
Maybe we'll make  something,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Em9[/ch]      [ch]A9sus[/ch]
me myself, I got nothing to prove.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]Em9[/ch]      [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]       [ch]A9sus[/ch]
You and I can   both get jobs,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]Em9[/ch]         [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[Interlude]

[Verse 3]
[tab]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch]
You see, my old man's got a problem,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]                              [ch]Em9[/ch]    [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]     [ch]A9sus[/ch]
He says his body's too old for   working,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]Em9[/ch]       [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]A9sus[/ch]
My mama went off and   left him,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]Em9[/ch]      [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]A9sus[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]A9sus[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Em9[/ch]    [ch]A9sus[/ch]

Pink Floyd  1975 (Wish You Were Here)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wish_You_Were_Here_(Pink_Floyd_album)

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  2x

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
So, so you think you can tell [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Heaven from Hell, [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Blue skies from pain. [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Can you tell a green field [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
From a cold steel rail? [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
A smile from a veil? [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Do you think you can tell? [/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And did they get you to trade [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Your heroes for ghosts? [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]

 How I wish, how I wish you were here. [/tab]

This was originally tabbed by Pencom but I switched the chords with some easier ones

Capo II or III depending on voice


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Almost heaven, West Virginia,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Blue Ridge Mountains, Shenandoah River.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Life is old there, older than the trees,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Younger than the mountains, growin' like a breeze. [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Country roads, take me home,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
To the place I belong: [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
West Virginia, mountain momma, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Take me home, country roads.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
All my mem'ries, gather 'round her, [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Miner's lady, stranger to blue water.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Dark and dusty, painted on the sky, [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Misty taste of moonshine, teardrop in my eye. [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Country roads, take me home,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
To the place I belong: [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
West Virginia, mountain momma, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Take me home, country roads.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch] 
I hear her voice, in the mornin' hours she calls me, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
The radio reminds me of my home far away.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
And drivin' down the road,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I get a feelin' that I should have been home yesterday,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D7[/ch]
yesterday.[/tab]

E|-----------------|-----------------|-----------------|-0---------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]E7[/ch]
   On a dark desert highway,    cool wind in my hair[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
  Warm smell of colitas   rising up through the air[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
  Up ahead in the distance,   I saw a shimmering light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
   My head grew heavy and my sight grew dim,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I had to stop for the night[/tab]
 
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]E7[/ch]
   There she stood in the doorway,    I heard the mission bell[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  And I was thinking to myself[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
This could be heaven or this could be hell[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
  Then she lit up a candle,   and she showed me the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
   There were voices down the corridor,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   I thought I heard them say...[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 Welcome to the Hotel California[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E7[/ch]                                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Such a lovely place (such a lovely place), such a lovely face[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
There's plenty of room at the Hotel California[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                                       [ch]E7[/ch]
Any time of year, (any time of year) You can find it here...[/tab]
 
[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]E7[/ch]
   Her mind is Tiffany twisted,    She got the Mercedes bends[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
  She got a lot of pretty pretty boys   that she calls friends[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
  How they danced in the courtyard, sweet summer sweat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]E7[/ch]
   Some dance to remember,    some dance to forget[/tab]
 
[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]E7[/ch]
   So I called up the captain; "Please bring me my wine" (he said)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]
  "We haven't had that spirit here since   1969"[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
  And still those voices are calling from far away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
   Wake you up in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   Just to hear them say...[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 Welcome to the Hotel California[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E7[/ch]                                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Such a lovely place (such a lovely place), such a lovely face[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
They're livin' it up at the Hotel California[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                                               [ch]E7[/ch]
What a nice surprise (what a nice surprise), bring your alibis[/tab]
 
[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]*                        [ch]E7[/ch]*
   Mirrors on the ceiling,    the pink champagne on ice (and she said)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]*                                [ch]D[/ch]*
  We are all just prisoners here,   of our own device[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]*                              [ch]C[/ch]*
  And in the master's chambers,   they gathered for the feast[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]*
   They stab it with their steely knives, but they[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]**
Just can't kill the beast[/tab]
 
[Verse 6]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]E7[/ch]
   Last thing I remember, I was    running for the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
  I had to find the passage back to the place I was before[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                     [ch]C[/ch]
  "Relax" said the night man, "we are   programmed to receive,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
   You can check out any time you like[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]
   But you can never leave"[/tab]
 
[Outro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]  x5

tuning: E A D G B E
